=== MAIN.PY SNIPPET ===
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg import FigureCanvasTkAgg
import numpy as np

class ParabolaPlotter:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = root
        self.root.title('Parabola Plotter')
        self.root.geometry('1200x800')
        self.root.state('zoomed')  # Full screen
        
        # Variables
        self.a = tk.StringVar(value='1')
        self.b = tk.StringVar(value='0')
        self.c = tk.StringVar(value='0')
        self.xlim_min = tk.StringVar(value='-10')
        self.xlim_max = tk.StringVar(value='10')
        self.ylim_min = tk.StringVar(value='-10')
        self.ylim_max = tk.StringVar(value='10')
        self.plots = []
        self.tangents = []
        self.selected_point = None
        
        # GUI Elements
        self.frame = ttk.Frame(self.root)
        self.frame.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)
        
        # Input fields
        ttk.Label(self.frame, text='a:').grid(row=0, column=0, padx=5, pady=5)
        ttk.Entry(self.frame, textvariable=self.a).grid(row=0, column=1, padx=5, pady=5)
        
        ttk.Label(self.frame, text='b:').grid(row=1, column=0, padx=5, pady=5)
        ttk.Entry(self.frame, textvariable=self.b).grid(row=1, column=1, padx=5, pady=5)
        
        ttk.Label(self.frame, text='c:').grid(row=2, column=0, padx=5, pady=5)
        ttk.Entry(self.frame, textvariable=self.c).grid(row=2, column=1, padx=5, pady=5)
